name: Dubai Youth Hostel
description: Reception 24/7. Pool, football field, chill-out garden, A/C in the room, small bar fridge. It's located next to a mosque so morning prayers may wake you. Stadium metro station and bus stop just 100 m from hostel, Lulu Hyper Market shopping center and supermarket nearby. Free safety deposit boxes (hang on to your key as they have stiff US$200 replacement fee). Clean rooms but unhelpful staff. You can walk there from Terminal 2. When you get out walk straight along 16th St to the end. It takes around 10 min. From terminal 1 or 3 you can take the metro to Union and transfer to Green Line (just take a train on the other side of the platform) to Stadium station (zone 1 fare, 2 dirhams). A taxi from terminal 1 or 3 costs around 40 dirhams. It is a branch of the UAE YHA, and only hostel in Dubai; thus booked up weeks ahead. WiFi cost extra 10 dirhams.
price_range: Dorm from 100 dirhams or US$27, breakfast included

name: Gulf Pearl Hotel
description: Rooms from 158 dirhams
address: Al Baraha St, Omar al Khattab Rd

name: [dead link]Pacific Hotel
description: Rooms from 300 dirhams or US$80.

name: Niawara Guest House
description: Probably one of the cheapest places in town.

name: Alkhayam Hotel
description: free wifi, nice cafe
address: Sikkat Al Khali Street, PO box 88249

name: Qasr Al Seyaha Hotel
description: Another cheapy in the souk area

name: [dead link]Al Jazeera Hotel
address: PO box 8814, Al Ahmadea Rd, Al Ras Area
price_range: 220 dirhams dbl rm (200 dirhams if booked for 1 week)

name: Galaxy Plaza
description: 2-star place, a step up from the under-200-dirham places.

name: Avari Dubai Hotel
description: Rooms from US$152.

name: Avenue Hotel
description: Rooms start at 350 dirhams, including breakfast.

name: Hyatt Regency Dubai
description: 414 rooms and suites with views of the Persian Gulf. Host to Al Dawaar, Dubai's only revolving restaurant.

name: InterContinental Residence Suites Dubai Festival City
description: Offers one-, two- and three-bedroom serviced suites with a choice between Creek and city views. Available for short or long stays.

name: Moevenpick Hotel Ibn Battuta Gate
description: This Arabian-themed hotel offers free Wireless Internet. It is a 5-star hotel with roof top swimming pool, meeting rooms, bars, private beach club, spa, kids club and fitness facilities. There are 396 spacious rooms with Moroccan styles with pleasing colors.
address: Off Sheikh Zayed Road Adjacent to Ibn Battuta Mall Dubai United Arab Emirates

name: Park Hyatt Dubai
description: Waterfront location next to the Dubai Creek Golf and Yacht Club.

name: Radisson Blu Hotel, Dubai Deira Creek
Taj Palace Hotel Dubai
description: Near Naif Square Bazaar.

name: Ascot Hotel
description: Has Russian, Irish and Thai themed restaurants. Rooms from AED $180.

name: Grand Hyatt Dubai
description: A resort style hotel with extensive conference facilities and 13 restaurants serving cuisine from all over the world.

name: Raffles Dubai
description: Attached to Wafi Mall. Egyptian themed.

name: The Address Downtown Dubai
description: One of the many luxury hotels next to Burj Khalifa with many good fine dining restaurants and bars.
address: Mohammed Bin Rashid Boulevard, Downtown Dubai

name: Anantara The Palm Dubai Resort
description: Houses the only over water villas in the UAE.

name: Atlantis, the Palm
description: Hotel on the Palm. Connects to mainland by monorail.

name: Fairmont Dubai
description: Closest 5-star hotel to the World Trade Centre.

name: Fraser Suites Dubai
description: Serviced apartments and accommodation.
address: Sidra Tower, Sheikh Zayed Road, Media City

name: Hilton Dubai Jumeirah
description: Resort with a private beach. The hotel is only 10 floors which is dwarfed by nearby high-rises, but the location is lively and the pool/garden area is lush.
address: Tower A, The Walk, Jumeirah Beach Residence

name: Holiday Inn Dubai - Al Barsha
description: 310 elegant rooms, a choice of 3 bars, choice of 2 fine dining restaurants and 6-storey high atrium and piano lounge. Gymnasium, roof top pool, massage rooms, sauna and spa.

name: Jumeirah Beach Hotel
description: Next to Burj al-Arab and run by the same company.

name: The Radisson Blu Residence, Dubai Marina
description: 5 km away from Jafza, and economic free zone. It has 152 apartments with scenic balcony, two restaurants with the convenience of onsite dining. They arrange variety of events from time to time.
address: Plot No. 392-260 Street K Dubai Marina

name: Chelsea Gardens Hotel Apartments
description: It has 169 well-appointed luxury comfortable and spacious apartment suites with modern interior. Upon request, they offer airport transfers.

name: Emirates Grand Hotel
description: It is a non-alcoholic hotel decorated with luxurious amenities. Equipped with stream rooms, hot tubs, sauna, roof top pool, fitness center and tennis court.
address: Near Finance Centre, Metro Stop, Sheikh Zayed Road

name: Dusit Thani Dubai
description: Beautiful surroundings with Asian hospitality and teak-wood furniture all around and Venetian blinds. champagne lounge available. They have 321 modern rooms equipped with high-speed Internet connections.

name: Hilton Dubai Al Habtoor City
description: The hotel is 44 floors and has 1004 guest rooms, 8 dining outlets and 21 meeting rooms. 10 minutes by car from Downtown Dubai.
address: Al Habtoor City, Sheikh Zayed Road

name: Th8 Palm Dubai Beach Resort
description: Beachfront resort.

name: Anantara World Islands Dubai Resort
description: Beachfront resort located on the World Islands.  Contains a Swimming pool, spa,  Paddle court, Fitness centre, Water sports centre, Kids’ club and Games room

name: The Heart of Europe
description: Complex of several European-themed hotels spanning six islands in the Europe section of the World Islands.  Includes Spanish-themed Marbella resort, four French Riviera-themed hotels (complete with marketplace and discotheque), Italian-themed Portofino Hotel, British-inspired Hotel London, Artist Hotel,  the Danish-style Hygge Hotel, the Sweden Beach house, and 133 floating villas

name: Jebel Ali Beach Hotel
description: Pets are not allowed. Speaks Russian, English, German and Arabic. This luxurious resort hotel is located on the Arabian Gulf. It has 1km private beach surrounded by palm trees and sun loungers. All the rooms are bright and stylish and they have fresh air and scenic balcony.
address: Exit 13, Sheikh Zayed Road, Jebel Ali, Dubai

name: Premier Inn Dubai Investments Park Hotel
description: This hotel offers, business services, multilingual staff, free wi-fi, Video Conferencing, night clubs, casinos, safe deposit box and swimming pool.

name: InterContinental Dubai Festival City
description: 498 rooms over 36 floors with views of the Dubai Creek and a 3800-m² event centre. Attached to the Festival Centre shopping mall.

name: The Meydan Hotel
description: Stylish hotel with 285 furnished rooms. It is equipped with rooftop pool, fitness center, spas, recreations centers like tennis and target shooting games. Its restaurant is specialized in steaks, Italian and Asian cuisine. Ladies-only units are also available.
address: Meydan Racecourse, Al Meydan Road, Nad Al Sheba

name: Hotel ibis
description: Located on Sheikh Zayed Road, next to Ski Dubai & Mall of the Emirates. This mid-range hotel has 204 cozy air-conditioned with bathtubs. Equipped with Italian restaurant, coffee shop and bar. Private indoor parking available.
price_range: 129 dirham for a room with a double bed

name: Studio One
description: A hotel in Studio City with many great restaurants (including Italian, Mexican, and Irish cuisine). The rooms are filled with modern art-y decor, as is the lobby. It also has a pool.
price_range: 151 dirham per night for a single room, however can be up to 900 depending on time of year
